trait.name: Bardic Inspiration (5/Day)
entries: As a bonus action, T'ha chooses one creature other than himself within 60 feet that can hear him. Within the next 10 minutes, the creature can roll a {@dice 1d8} and add the number rolled to one ability check, attack roll, or saving throw.

trait.name: Feline Agility
entries: When T'ha moves on his turn in combat, he can double his speed until the end of the turn. Once he uses this trait, he can't use it again until he moves 0 feet on one of his turns.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: T'ha is a 9th-level spellcaster. His spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 17; {@hit 9} to hit with spell attacks).

action.name: Rapier
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d8 + 4}) piercing damage.

action.name: Dissonant Chord {@recharge 5}
entries: One creature T'ha can see within 60 feet must make a DC 17 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, it takes 27 ({@damage 6d8}) psychic damage and must use its reaction, if available, to move up to its speed away from T'ha. On a success, it takes half damage and doesn't move.

reaction.name: Cutting Words (3/Day)
entries: When a creature T'ha can see within 60 feet makes an attack roll, ability check, or damage roll, T'ha rolls a {@dice 1d8} and subtracts it from the roll.

trait.name: Cunning Action
entries: On each of his turns, Bro can take the Dash, Disengage, or Hide action as a bonus action.

trait.name: Evasion
entries: If Bro is subjected to an effect that allows him to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, he instead takes no damage if he succeeds on the saving throw, and only half damage if he fails.

trait.name: Sneak Attack (1/Turn)
entries: Bro deals an extra 21 ({@damage 6d6}) damage when he hits a target with a weapon attack and has advantage on the attack roll, or when the target is within 5 feet of an ally of Bro that isn't incapacitated and Bro doesn't have disadvantage on the attack roll.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Bro makes two Shortsword or Shortbow attacks. He can apply Sneak Attack only once on his turn.

action.name: Shortsword
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d6 + 5}) piercing damage.

action.name: Shortbow
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 9} to hit, range 80/320 ft., one target. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d6 + 5}) piercing damage.

action.name: Cloak of Flight (1/Day)
entries: Bro gains a flying speed of 60 feet for 10 minutes.

reaction.name: Uncanny Dodge
entries: Bro halves the damage that he takes from an attack that hits him. Bro must be able to see the attacker.

monster.name: Tena, Mercy of the Bright Venom

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: Tena can breathe air and water.

trait.name: Poisonous Skin
entries: A creature that grapples Tena or otherwise comes into direct contact with his skin must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or be {@condition poisoned} until the end of its next turn.

trait.name: Evasion
entries: If Tena is subjected to an effect that allows him to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, he instead takes no damage if he succeeds on the saving throw, and only half damage if he fails.

trait.name: Mercy Adept
entries: Once on each of his turns, when Tena hits with an unarmed strike, he can either deal an extra 7 ({@damage 2d6}) necrotic damage or cause one creature he can touch to regain 14 ({@dice 2d8 + 5}) hit points.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Tena makes three Unarmed Strike attacks.

action.name: Unarmed Strike
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}10 ({@damage 1d10 + 5}) bludgeoning damage plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) poison damage.

action.name: Eldritch Claw Burst (1/Day)
entries: For 1 minute, Tena's unarmed strikes have a reach of 15 feet and deal an extra 5 ({@damage 1d10}) force damage on a hit.

bonus.name: Step of the Wind
entries: Tena takes the Dash or Disengage action.

reaction.name: Deflect Attack
entries: When Tena is hit by a weapon attack, he reduces the damage by 18 ({@dice 1d10 + 13}). If this reduces the damage to 0, Tena can move up to 10 feet without provoking opportunity attacks.

trait.name: Fey Ancestry
entries: Shael has advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and magic can't put her to sleep.

trait.name: Cunning Action
entries: On each of her turns, Shael can take the Dash, Disengage, or Hide action as a bonus action.

trait.name: Evasion
entries: If Shael is subjected to an effect that allows her to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, she instead takes no damage if she succeeds on the saving throw, and only half damage if she fails.

trait.name: Underdark Guide
entries: Shael and allies of her choice within 30 feet ignore nonmagical difficult terrain caused by stone, rubble, fungi, and webs.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Shael makes two Drow Blade or Hand Crossbow attacks.

action.name: Drow Blade
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d8 + 4}) piercing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) poison damage.

action.name: Hand Crossbow
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 8} to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d6 + 4}) piercing damage.

trait.name: Rage (3/Day)
entries: As a bonus action, Garrok enters a rage for 1 minute. While raging, he has resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage and deals 3 extra damage with Strength-based melee weapon attacks.

trait.name: Reckless
entries: At the start of his turn, Garrok can gain advantage on melee weapon attack rolls using Strength, but attack rolls against him have advantage until the start of his next turn.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Garrok makes two Greataxe attacks.

action.name: Greataxe
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}11 ({@damage 1d12 + 5}) slashing damage, or 14 ({@damage 1d12 + 8}) slashing damage while raging.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: Edran is a 9th-level spellcaster. His spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save DC 16; {@hit 8} to hit with spell attacks).

action.name: Arcane Staff
entries: {@atk ms} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d8 + 4}) force damage.

action.name: Force Burst
entries: {@atk rs} {@hit 8} to hit, range 120 ft., one target. {@h}14 ({@damage 3d6 + 4}) force damage.

trait.name: Cunning Action
entries: On each of her turns, Liarel can take the Dash, Disengage, or Hide action as a bonus action.

trait.name: Sneak Attack (1/Turn)
entries: Liarel deals an extra 17 ({@damage 5d6}) damage when she hits with a weapon attack and qualifies for sneak attack.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Liarel makes two Shortsword or Longbow attacks.

action.name: Shortsword
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d6 + 5}) piercing damage.

action.name: Longbow
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 9} to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d8 + 5}) piercing damage.

trait.name: Dwarven Resilience
entries: Bruni has advantage on saving throws against poison, and she has resistance to poison damage.

trait.name: Rage (3/Day)
entries: As a bonus action, Bruni enters a rage for 1 minute. While raging, she has resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage and deals 3 extra damage with Strength-based melee weapon attacks.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Bruni makes two Maul attacks.

action.name: Maul
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) bludgeoning damage, or 14 ({@damage 2d6 + 7}) while raging.

trait.name: Formation Fighter
entries: Marcus gains a +2 bonus to AC while at least one ally is within 5 feet of him and isn't incapacitated.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Marcus makes three Longsword attacks.

action.name: Longsword
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d8 + 4}) slashing damage.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: Alena is a 9th-level spellcaster. Her spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 16; {@hit 8} to hit with spell attacks).

action.name: Mace
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d6 + 1}) bludgeoning damage plus 9 ({@damage 2d8}) radiant damage.

action.name: Mass Healing Word (1/Day)
entries: Up to six creatures of Alena's choice within 60 feet regain 11 ({@dice 1d4 + 9}) hit points.

trait.name: Underdark Scout
entries: Orien has advantage on Wisdom ({@skill Perception}) and Wisdom ({@skill Survival}) checks made to track creatures or detect hazards underground.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Orien makes two Longbow or Shortsword attacks.

action.name: Longbow
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 8} to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d8 + 4}) piercing damage.

trait.name: Echo Pack
entries: The grimlock has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the grimlock's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.

action.name: Spiked Club
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) bludgeoning damage.

trait.name: False Appearance
entries: While the darkmantle remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from a cave formation.

action.name: Crush
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d10 + 3}) bludgeoning damage, and the darkmantle attaches to the target.

action.name: Darkness Aura (1/Day)
entries: A 15-foot radius of magical darkness extends from the darkmantle for 1 minute.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The hook horror makes two Hook attacks.

action.name: Hook
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d8 + 3}) piercing damage.

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: The cave fisher can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) slashing damage.

action.name: Filament
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 5} to hit, range 60 ft., one Large or smaller creature. The target is {@condition grappled} (escape DC 13).

trait.name: Tunneler
entries: The umber hulk can burrow through solid rock at half its burrow speed and leaves a 5-foot-wide tunnel in its wake.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The umber hulk makes three attacks: two with its Claws and one with its Mandibles.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}10 ({@damage 1d8 + 6}) slashing damage.

action.name: Mandibles
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}15 ({@damage 2d8 + 6}) slashing damage.

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: The chitine can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The chitine makes three Dagger attacks.

action.name: Dagger
entries: {@atk mw,rw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d4 + 3}) piercing damage.

trait.name: Stone Camouflage
entries: The grick has advantage on Dexterity ({@skill Stealth}) checks made to hide in rocky terrain.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The grick makes three attacks: two with its Tentacles and one with its Beak.

action.name: Tentacles
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) slashing damage.

action.name: Beak
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}17 ({@damage 3d8 + 4}) piercing damage.

table.name: Underdark Complete Encounter Pack Roster
rows: Echo-Hunter Grimlock, Veil Darkmantle, Deep Hook Horror, Chasm Cave Fisher, Wall-Breaker Umber Hulk, Ceiling Chitine, Deep Grick Alpha
